tool_args.raw_text: Implementation Date: June 2024

payload.description: Implementation of express bus service additions on BM2, BM5, SIM1C, SIM4C, SIM23, and SIM24

evidence_refs.source_quote: June 2024

tool_args.label: Congestion Pricing Launch
tool_args.raw_text: Congestion Pricing (formally known as the Central Business District Tolling Program) is planned to launch in June 2024.

payload.description: Congestion Pricing (Central Business District Tolling Program) planned launch

evidence_refs.source_quote: Congestion Pricing (formally known as the Central Business District Tolling Program) is planned to launch in June 2024.

tool_args.label: Annualized operating cost increase - total
tool_args.raw_text: The net result of the recommended service revision would be an annualized increase in operating cost of approximately $883,000 per year.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The net result of the recommended service revision would be an annualized increase in operating cost of approximately $883,000 per year.

tool_args.label: Annualized operating cost increase - NYCT routes
tool_args.raw_text: $629,000 per year would be on NYCT bus routes

evidence_refs.source_quote: $629,000 per year would be on NYCT bus routes (including $496,000 for the SIM23 and SIM24 funded by the City of New York)

tool_args.label: Ample capacity claim
tool_args.raw_text: Detailed analysis has shown that all bus routes in the MTA network entering the Congestion Relief Zone have ample capacity to transport the additional passengers anticipated after Congestion Pricing goes live.

payload.claim_text: All bus routes in the MTA network entering the Congestion Relief Zone have ample capacity to transport the additional passengers anticipated after Congestion Pricing goes live.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Detailed analysis has shown that all bus routes in the MTA network entering the Congestion Relief Zone have ample capacity to transport the additional passengers anticipated after Congestion Pricing goes live.

tool_args.label: Ridership monitoring plan
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA will monitor ridership levels on these express bus routes after Congestion Pricing to assess whether the additional ridership justifies the additional service.

payload.claim_text: The MTA will monitor ridership levels on these express bus routes after Congestion Pricing to assess whether the additional ridership justifies the additional service.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTA will monitor ridership levels on these express bus routes after Congestion Pricing to assess whether the additional ridership justifies the additional service.

tool_args.label: Regular evaluation of added trips
tool_args.raw_text: These express bus routes would be evaluated as part of the regular review of bus ridership levels to assess whether these added trips should continue to operate.

payload.claim_text: These express bus routes would be evaluated as part of the regular review of bus ridership levels to assess whether these added trips should continue to operate.

evidence_refs.source_quote: These express bus routes would be evaluated as part of the regular review of bus ridership levels to assess whether these added trips should continue to operate.

tool_args.label: Express Bus Service Additions in support of Congestion Pricing
